promoted_facts.fact: PTP360 fee in franchise agreement is $3.00/inspection, but FDD Item 6 lists $3.10/inspection
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E vs. franchise agreement Section 4.5
promoted_facts.note: Minor discrepancy — Item 6 fee ($3.10) is the current fee, agreement ($3.00) may be the base fee before adjustment

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor generated $5,075,240 from required supplier purchases = 35.9% of total revenue of $14,127,981
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C, Item 8 p.28
promoted_facts.note: Already in canonical but verifying Pillar To Post-specific revenue (not FS Brands consolidated)

promoted_facts.fact: Brand Conference Fee in franchise agreement is $1,099 current, vs $924-$1,099 range in FDD Item 6
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass B vs. franchise agreement Section 4.9
promoted_facts.note: Agreement shows current fee; FDD shows range including early-bird discount

promoted_facts.fact: Punitive damages waiver in franchise agreement Section 25
promoted_facts.note: Not in canonical. Important buyer protection issue — waiver may be void in CA and other states

promoted_facts.fact: 1-year limitation period for claims in franchise agreement Section 25
promoted_facts.note: Not in canonical. Shortened statute of limitations — may not be enforceable in all states

promoted_facts.fact: AI policy — expressly prohibits entering proprietary/customer data into public AI models
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass D, Item 14 p.48, franchise agreement Section 10.2
promoted_facts.note: Distinctive modern clause worth surfacing in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Domain name and social media accounts irrevocably assigned to franchisor
promoted_facts.source: Contract burden depth pass, franchise agreement Section 8.4
promoted_facts.note: Unusual broad assignment — includes accounts not approved by franchisor

promoted_facts.fact: Annual reviewed (not audited) financial statements required from franchisee within 90 days of fiscal year end
promoted_facts.source: Contract burden depth pass, franchise agreement Section 11.3.2
promoted_facts.note: Significant ongoing cost for franchisee — CPA review engagement
